case_title: LUIS RAMON SEGOVIA GONZALEZ VS. PALETALANDIA, INC.,A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, LUIS RAMON SEGOVIA ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT PALETALANDIA, INC.,A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
